ogTitle: Busbys Flat vs Buttaba: Climate Safety

heading: Busbys Flat vs Buttaba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Busbys Flat, New South Wales and Buttaba, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Busbys Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Buttaba (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Busbys Flat or Buttaba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Busbys Flat has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Buttaba scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Busbys Flat scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Buttaba scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Busbys Flat or Buttaba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Busbys Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
